TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kakelic, title = kakelic, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kakelic} }

S.FORM: kakelic (kamu nu Hulam: ÁęĻÁ≠Ź,Áć®śú®Ťąü,ŚįŹŤąĻ) u balunga sapisanga'an ku awuk .
S.PHON: kak…ôr~…ĺi ¶ (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: **,***,**) u bar~…ĺuŇča sapisaŇča Ē~ °an ku awuk .
